tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]

[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Yo, listen up here's a story[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
About a little guy that lives in[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
a blue world[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
And all day and all night and everything he sees[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Is just blue like him[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
inside and outside[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Blue is his house with a blue little[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
window, and a blue corvette[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
And everything is blue for him, and himself[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
And everybody around, 'cause he ain't[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch] (hold)
got nobody to listen.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]

window. Blue is the color of all that I wear.[/tab]

Blue are the streets and all the trees are too.[/tab]

and she is so blue.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Blue are the people here that walk around,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Blue like my corvette, it's standing outside.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
